_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Lea ki e kāinga, pea hū.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan 'oku langa ke tatala ki he lea kotoa pē. Ko e lea tatala 'oku 'iai ha totongi 'e taha ki he fakatonulea.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks tuku atu (ngaahi token kau ki ai)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Ko e lisi lea mo e ngaahi 'aata Marks 'oku feave'aki. Ko e Marks ko e ngaahi token kau ki ai, 'ikai ko e saea.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Fakatonulea 'a Liana Banyan ki he {{language}}. Ma'u {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Ngaahi Folofola Malo e Lelei / Māmani Laumālie
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Ngaahi fakatonu fononga mo e ngaahi pōpoaki hala
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Leá 'a e Tu'i Ngāue: Ko e Ha 'a e Ngaahi Lea ni
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: 'Oku 'iai ha'ane 'uhinga 'a e huafa 'o e lea kotoa pē 'i he ngāue ni. 'Uhinga 26 huafa mahu'inga.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Ko e Ha 'a e Ngaahi Totongi Fakatonulea
speakFriend.step1Body: Tatali e Totongi Fakatonulea mei Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Fakatonulea e ngaahi laine kotoa pē. Tuku atu 'ia Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Hili hono tali, ke ma'u Marks pea tānaki ki he IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Pehe ko e kaungame'a, huu mai."

languageSwitcher.tip: Fa'ahi ngaahi lea kehekehe ki he Matapā 'o Durin ke hu ki he ngaahi a'usia makehe!
